---
title: "The Very Rev. Henry Alford"
---

## The Very Rev. Henry Alford

**Dates:** (1810-1871)

### Description

Dean of Canterbury

### Biography

He served as Dean of Canterbury from 1857 to his death. He was associated with campaigns against ritualism, which may account for CMY\'s sense that he was not fully sympathetic to her.

### Letters

- Letter from March 27th 1866
- Letter from Feb 17th [1866]    

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
